scripts.precap: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html version.json version.json manifest.json sw.js www/ && cp -r css js www/ && mkdir -p www/lib && cp lib/three.min.js lib/topojson-client.js www/lib/ && mkdir -p www/data && cp data/city-3d-coords.json data/ne_50m_land.topojson data/elevations.json www/data/ && mkdir -p www/lang && cp lang/en.json www/lang/ && echo 'www ready'
scripts.cap:sync: npm run precap && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:build: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
